name: 15-16 温度与热力学（理想气体/第一定律）
subject: physics
domain_name: A2 · 力学进阶与场 Advanced Mechanics & Fields (Topics 13-18)
curriculum_points: define and use linear momentum as the product of mass and velocity
state the principle of conservation of momentum

apply the principle of conservation of momentum to solve simple problems, including elastic and inelastic interactions between objects in both one and two dimensions (knowledge of the concept of coefficient of restitution is not required)
recall that, for an elastic collision, total kinetic energy is conserved and the relative speed of approach is equal to the relative speed of separation

excerpts.text: define and use linear momentum as the product of mass and velocity
state the principle of conservation of momentum

apply the principle of conservation of momentum to solve simple problems, including elastic and inelastic interactions between objects in both one and two dimensions (knowledge of the concept of coefficient of restitution is not required)
recall that, for an elastic collision, total kinetic energy is conserved and the relative speed of approach is equal to the relative speed of separation

interactive_resources.description: PhET 物质状态：加热冷却观察分子运动（中文版）
GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「15-16 温度与热力学（理想气体/第一定律）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：define and use linear momentum as the product of mass and velocity…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：state the principle of conservation of momentum… 对理解「15-16 温度与热力学（理想气体/第一定律）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
